mapper.select: SELECT no,name,poster,address,phone,likecount,replycount,theme,content, type FROM food ORDER BY no ASC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT 12 ROWS ONLY
SELECT no,name,poster,address,rownum FROM food WHERE address LIKE '%'||#{address}||'%' AND rownum<=7
SELECT no,name,poster, type FROM food WHERE type LIKE '%'||#{type}||'%' ORDER BY no ASC
